studyName: National Epidemiologic Survey on Alcohol and Related Conditions-III (NESARC-III)

tables.description: Subject ID, education, race, family income,  marital status, employment, language, sex, family history of alcohol and drug problems, age, BMI, weight/height, DSM-5 AUD, DSM-5 cannabis use disorder, DSM-5 nicotine use disorder, DSM-5 opioid use disorder, DSM-5 cocaine use disorder, DSM-5 alcohol use disorder, DSM-5 anorexia nervosa, DSM-5 antisocial personality, DSM-5 agoraphobia, DSM-5 binge-eating disorder, DSM-5 bipolar 1 disorder, DSM-5 borderline personality disorder, DSM-5 bulimia nervosa, DSM-5 club drug use disorder, DSM-5 conduct disorder without/with Soc/Occ, DSM-5 hallucinogen use disorder, DSM-5 heroin use disorder, DSM-5 dysthymia,  DSM-5 generalized anxiety disorder, DSM-5 hypomanic episode, DSM-5 manic episode, DSM-5 major depressive disorder, DSM-5 drug use disorder, DSM-5 panic disorder, DSM-5 posttraumatic stress disorder, DSM-5 sedative use disorder, DSM-5 social phobia, DSM-5 inhalant/solvent use disorder, DSM-5 specific phobia, DSM-5 stimulant use disorder, DSM-5 schizotypal personality disorder,  adverse childhood experience, diagnostic criterion of cannabis use, nicotine withdrawal, tobacco use, opioid use, opioid withdrawal,  and alcohol use,  alcohol withdrawal, cannabis withdrawal, opioid withdrawal, relatives ever alcoholic, relative ever had drug problems, health, mental, physical, pain, vitality, social, and emotional scales, obesity, urbanicity, family, angry, stress, correctional facility, drinking, mania/hypomania, suicide, heroin, inhalants, hallucinogens, club drugs, stimulants, cocaine, marijuana, painkillers, sedatives/tranquilizers, and drug use, alcohol consumption, cannabis use, drug adductions, opioid use, and smoking, heart disease, heart disease, cirrhosis of liver, AIDS, stomach ulcer,  transmitted/venereal disease, and epilepsy or seizure disorder of participants with or without alcohol, tobacco, or drug use and involved in the "National Epidemiologic Survey on Alcohol and Related Conditions-III (NESARC-III)" project.

variables.description: MOTHER OF SAMPLE PERSON IN HOUSEHOLD

variables.name: N10Q1A1
variables.description: HAVE USUALLY GOTTEN ATTACHED TO PEOPLE VERY QUICKLY

variables.name: N10Q1A10
variables.description: HAVE GONE TO EXTREMES TO KEEP PEOPLE FROM LEAVING YOU

variables.name: N10Q1A11
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN HAD TEMPER OUTBURSTS OR GOTTEN SO ANGRY THAT YOU LOSE CONTROL

variables.name: N10Q1A12
variables.description: HAVE HIT PEOPLE OR THROWN THINGS WHEN YOU GOT ANGRY

variables.name: N10Q1A13
variables.description: EVEN LITTLE THINGS HAVE MADE YOU ANGRY/HAVE HAD DIFFICULTY CONTROLLING YOUR ANGER

variables.name: N10Q1A14
variables.description: HAVE BEEN LOTS OF SUDDEN CHANGES IN YOUR PERSONAL GOALS, CAREER PLANS, RELIGIOUS BELIEFS, OR OTHER IMPORTANT ASPECTS OF YOUR LIFE

variables.name: N10Q1A15
variables.description: HAVE BEEN SO DIFFERENT WITH DIFFERENT PEOPLE OR IN DIFFERENT SITUATIONS THAT YOU SOMETIMES DON NOT KNOW WHO YOU REALLY ARE

variables.name: N10Q1A16
variables.description: SENSE OF WHO YOU ARE OFTEN CHANGED DEPENDING ON THE SITUATION OR WHOM YOU ARE WITH

variables.name: N10Q1A17
variables.description: ALL OF A SUDDEN HAVE CHANGED YOUR SENSE OF WHO YOU ARE AND WHERE YOU ARE HEADED

variables.name: N10Q1A18
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT LIKE YOUR LIFE HAD NO PURPOSE OR MEANING

variables.name: N10Q1A19
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT EMPTY INSIDE

variables.name: N10Q1A2
variables.description: RELATIONSHIPS WITH PEOPLE YOU REALLY CARE ABOUT HAVE HAD LOTS OF EXTREME UPS AND DOWNS

variables.name: N10Q1A20
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT THAT YOU WERE NOT REAL WHEN UNDER A LOT OF STRESS

variables.name: N10Q1A21
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT LIKE YOU WERE OUTSIDE YOUR BODY WHEN UNDER A LOT OF STRESS

variables.name: N10Q1A22
variables.description: HAVE FELT SUSPICIOUS OR DISTRUSTFUL OF OTHER PEOPLE WHEN UNDER A LOT OF STRESS

variables.name: N10Q1A23
variables.description: HAVE CUT, BURNED, OR SCRATCHED YOURSELF ON PURPOSE WHEN UNDER A LOT OF STRESS

variables.name: N10Q1A24
variables.description: HAVE TRIED TO HURT OR KILL YOURSELF, OR THREATENED TO DO SO

variables.name: N10Q1A25
variables.description: HAVE GOTTEN INTO SEXUAL RELATIONSHIPS QUICKLY/WITHOUT THINKING ABOUT CONSEQUENCES

variables.name: N10Q1A26
variables.description: HAVE BEEN PERIODS OF YOUR LIFE WHEN YOU OFTEN SPENT TOO MUCH MONEY WHILE SHOPPING OR GAMBLING

variables.name: N10Q1A27
variables.description: HAVE HAD PERIODS IN YOUR LIFE WHEN YOU DRANK A LOT MORE OR USED A LOT MORE DRUGS THAN YOU MEANT TO

variables.name: N10Q1A28
variables.description: HAVE HAD PERIODS IN YOUR LIFE WHEN YOU OFTEN TOOK TOO MANY RISKS WHEN DRIVING

variables.name: N10Q1A29
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN DONE THINGS IMPULSIVELY, NOT CARING ABOUT THE CONSEQUENCES

variables.name: N10Q1A3
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN STARTED OUT THINKING THAT SOMEONE WAS A GREAT PERSON ONLY TO BE DISAPPOINTED WHEN THEY DID NOT LIVE UP TO YOUR EXPECTATIONS

variables.name: N10Q1A30
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN ENGAGED IN RECKLESS BEHAVIOR WITHOUT THINKING ABOUT HOW DANGEROUS IT COULD BE

variables.name: N10Q1A31
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN BEEN VERY CRITICAL OF YOURSELF

variables.name: N10Q1A32
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT SLIGHTED OR INSULTED BY OTHERS

variables.name: N10Q1A33
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT THAT PEOPLE IN GENERAL CANNOT BE TRUSTED

variables.name: N10Q1A331
variables.description: HAVE TENDED TO SEE ONLY THE NEGATIVE ASPECTS OF OTHER PEOPLE

variables.name: N10Q1A332
variables.description: HAVE GOTTEN VERY NERVOUS, TENSE OR PANICKY WHEN YOU HAVE BEEN UNDER A LOT OF STRESS

variables.name: N10Q1A333
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT MISERABLE OR HOPELESS AND FOUND IT HARD TO GET OUT OF THESE MOODS

variables.name: N10Q1A334
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN WORRIED OR BEEN ANXIOUS ABOUT BEING REJECTED OR ABANDONED BY FAMILY, FRIENDS, OR LOVED ONES

variables.name: N10Q1A335
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FEARED THE FUTURE BECAUSE IT SEEMED SO UNCERTAIN

variables.name: N10Q1A34
variables.description: AGE WHEN SOME OF THESE EXPERIENCES BEGAN TO HAPPEN AROUND THE SAME TIME

variables.name: N10Q1A35
variables.description: AGE AT THE MOST RECENT TIME WHEN HAD ANY OF THESE EXPERIENCES

variables.name: N10Q1A36
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT THAT THINGS THAT HAVE NO SPECIAL MEANING TO MOST PEOPLE ARE REALLY MEANT TO GIVE YOU A MESSAGE

variables.name: N10Q1A37
variables.description: HAVE FELT SUSPICIOUS OF PEOPLE, EVEN IF YOU HAVE KNOWN THEM FOR AWHILE

variables.name: N10Q1A38
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT THAT YOU ARE BEING WATCHED/STARED AT WHEN AROUND PEOPLE

variables.name: N10Q1A39
variables.description: HAVE EVER FELT THAT YOU COULD MAKE THINGS HAPPEN JUST BY MAKING A WISH OR THINKING ABOUT THEM

variables.name: N10Q1A4
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN BECOME VERY SAD, ANXIOUS OR ANGRY OVER LITTLE THINGS

variables.name: N10Q1A40
variables.description: HAVE HAD PERSONAL EXPERIENCES WITH THE SUPERNATURAL

variables.name: N10Q1A41
variables.description: HAVE BELIEVED THAT YOU HAVE A SIXTH SENSE THAT ALLOWS YOU TO KNOW AND PREDICT THINGS THAT OTHERS CAN NOT

variables.name: N10Q1A42
variables.description: HAVE SENSED THAT SOME FORCE IS AROUND YOU, EVEN THOUGH YOU CANNOT SEE ANYONE

variables.name: N10Q1A43
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN SEEN AURAS OR ENERGY FIELDS AROUND PEOPLE

variables.name: N10Q1A44
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN THOUGHT THAT OBJECTS OR SHADOWS ARE REALLY PEOPLE OR ANIMALS, OR THAT NOISES ARE ACTUALLY PEOPLE VOICES

variables.name: N10Q1A45
variables.description: PEOPLE HAVE THOUGHT YOU ARE ODD, ECCENTRIC OR STRANGE

variables.name: N10Q1A46
variables.description: PEOPLE HAVE THOUGHT YOU ACT STRANGELY

variables.name: N10Q1A47
variables.description: HAVE HAD VERY FEW PEOPLE THAT YOU ARE REALLY CLOSE TO OUTSIDE OF IMMEDIATE FAMILY

variables.name: N10Q1A48
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FELT NERVOUS OR ANXIOUS WHEN WITH OTHER PEOPLE EVEN IF YOU HAVE KNOWN THEM FOR AWHILE

variables.name: N10Q1A49
variables.description: HAS BEEN UNUSUAL FOR YOU TO SHOW EMOTION

variables.name: N10Q1A5
variables.description: OTHER PEOPLE HAVE OFTEN WONDERED WHY YOU GET SO UPSET SO EASILY

variables.name: N10Q1A50
variables.description: HAVE HAD TROUBLE EXPRESSING YOUR EMOTIONS AND FEELINGS

variables.name: N10Q1A51
variables.description: PEOPLE HAVE THOUGHT YOU HAVE STRANGE IDEAS

variables.name: N10Q1A52
variables.description: HAVE OFTEN FOUND IT DIFFICULT TO TRUST OTHER PEOPLE

variables.description: HAVE PREFERRED TO BE ALONE RATHER THAN BEING WITH OTHER PEOPLE

variables.name: N10Q1A55
variables.description: HAVE HAD DIFFICULTY SETTING REALISTIC GOALS IN YOUR PERSONAL LIFE, CAREER PLANS OR OTHER IMPORTANT ASPECTS OF YOUR LIFE

variables.description: PEOPLE HAVE TOLD YOU THAT YOUR EXPRESSIONS DID NOT FIT SITUATION YOU WERE IN/HOW YOU SAID YOU WERE FEELING

variables.description: HAVE OFTEN HAD PERSONAL GOALS THAT OTHERS SAID WERE UNREALISTIC/MADE NO SENSE

variables.description: HAVE OFTEN CHANGED YOUR MIND ABOUT WHAT IS WORTHWHILE OR IMPORTANT
